title: Wow My download of all released EVA mangas just finiished
display_title: Wow My download of all released EVA mangas just finiished
wikitext:
[]: Wow! My download of all released EVA mangas just finiished!             Quote Post by JinKazama » Mon May 30, 2005 6:54 am Took me quite a while to have all of them download, I know its mangas aren't finished yet, as they said "we are taking a long break...." anyway, I started reading a few volumes and found the manga was different from whats told in TV episodes story, wonder if it's by the same perosn who made the Evangelion TV series. Also, has anyone here seen the Grilfriend of Steel verison of Evangelion manga, it was hilarious though I don't like the drawings at all, looked like a total different anime to me, and everytime when I saw Rei's face I always mistook her for Kaworu. ( they looked exactly the same!)

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 30, 2005 7:00 am The manga is by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto and it's his own version of Evangelion. I don't really know much about it. One of the other members should be able to tell you more.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Mon May 30, 2005 9:33 am DirtyHamster wrote: The manga is by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto and it's his own version of Evangelion. I don't really know much about it. One of the other members should be able to tell you more.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 30, 2005 9:37 am No no. It's more or less the same story he's just look at it from at different pair of eyes. I think he is trying to tell the story from Shinjis point of view. Again, I don't really know. ...EDIT... Where the hell are all the manga freaks?

[]: Re: Wow! My download of all released EVA mangas just finiish             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon May 30, 2005 9:44 am JinKazama wrote: Also, has anyone here seen the Grilfriend of Steel verison of Evangelion manga, it was hilarious though I don't like the drawings at all, looked like a total different anime to me, and everytime when I saw Rei's face I always mistook her for Kaworu. ( they looked exactly the same!)

[]: Re: Wow! My download of all released EVA mangas just finiish             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 30, 2005 9:57 am Ryo wrote: He/She/They/It made Shinji look like a retard

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon May 30, 2005 11:40 am DirtyHamtaro wrote: Yo, where the, like, hell are all the manga freaks , yo?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 30, 2005 12:25 pm Jin, why are you announcing to the world that you've downloaded these, instead of purchased them? [Worf]Have you no honor?!?[/Worf]

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Tue May 31, 2005 1:53 am Reichu wrote: Jin, why are you announcing to the world that you've downloaded these, instead of purchased them? [Worf]Have you no honor?!?[/Worf]

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Tue May 31, 2005 2:05 am Ryo wrote: DirtyHamtaro wrote: Yo, where the, like, hell are all the manga freaks , yo?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Tue May 31, 2005 5:30 am JinKazama wrote: I am starting to recolor the manga just for fun
